problem.note: EXPECTED_GIT_SHA CF worker secret tracked repo HEAD while platform Railway lagged after www-only commits.

immediate_unblock.requires: Cloudflare wrangler auth (Mac vault or CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN)
immediate_unblock.command: LIVE=$(curl -sS https://platform.noetfield.com/api/public/chat/health | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['git_sha'])"); cd ~/Projects/Noetfield && bash scripts/sync-probe-expected-sha.sh "$LIVE" && cd infra/nf-probe-cron && wrangler deploy

post_deploy: bash scripts/sync-probe-expected-sha.sh "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" after platform Railway deploy

superseded.reason: Conflicts with Noetfield main (ae9bb11). Do not apply.

cloud_agent_blocker: cursor[bot] lacks push access to Noetfield-Systems/Noetfield (403)
